title: vaccinium lancifolium
intro: Vaccinium lancifolium, also known as the lance-leaved blueberry or mountain blueberry, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub that belongs to the heath family. It is native to the mountainous regions of North America and is valued for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Vaccinium lancifolium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
